paintings.name: Superhero
paintings.description: A living triptych: two canvases and the woman standing between them. It begins with the Beekeeper, surrounded by 99 bees, offering flowers to the one who watches. But when the right woman is loved, she transforms him into the Aztec Warrior - a reminder that who we become is shaped by who we protect.

paintings.name: Keith Moooring
paintings.description: The world tells you to sit still and be serious; Mooonarch refuses. This painting is a daily command to lose yourself in the rhythm. It’s a tribute to the pure, childlike freedom of dancing when no one else is in the room.

paintings.name: Creation of Society
paintings.music: Balaji Srinivasan for Lex Fridman Podcast
paintings.description: The Nebra Sky Disk didn't just track the sun; it changed history by giving humanity control over time. In this piece, Mooonarch carries the foundation of early society - ceremonial power, agriculture, and commerce. It’s a tribute to the very first builders who looked up at the sky and decided to map the future.

paintings.name: on Fire
paintings.description: Dedicated to the unbreakable spirit of the Iranian people. This piece captures the raw, fearless confidence of a nation fighting to be entirely itself
paintings.music: Seven Nation Army by The White Stripes

paintings.name: Initium Novum
paintings.description: We build our next chapters on the ruins of what came before. This painting is a testament to resilience—a reminder that "The End" is an illusion, and every closing door is just the birth of a new Mooonarch.

paintings.name: Adam
paintings.description: This is Adam - the first man walking through the jungle, surrounded by the 7 deadly sins hidden in the details. When you look at it, you get to choose your perspective. You might relate to someone hiding in the leaves, scared of him. You might see yourself as Adam, the warrior carrying the fire. Or maybe you're the predator looking at your next prey. How you see it is always your choice.

paintings.name: Zero to One
paintings.description: Peter Thiel’s Zero to One focuses on creating entirely new things rather than iterating on existing ones.

paintings.name: Leonardo Mooo Vinci
paintings.description: You don't need to be flawless. You just need to be exactly who you are right now. I wrote this directly on the canvas because we all forget that the messy, confusing steps are actually the ones building our strength. You're not behind. You're just moving at your own unique rhythm. Be proud of that

paintings.name: Jean Michel Mooosquiat
paintings.description: Sometimes you just don't know what to do. But if you trust the path you're taking, you might just look over and see a kid on a playground launching a rocket. This painting is about trusting the process.

paintings.name: I Believe in you, Bummy
paintings.description: You see all that text in the background? That’s literally the first four chapters of the Bible—the creation of the universe. And standing right in the middle of all that massive, cosmic history is Mooonarch holding a sign that says, 'I believe in you, dummy.' It’s basically the universe looking at you, seeing you doubt yourself, and saying: 'I created everything, and I’m betting on you. Stop overthinking it.'

paintings.name: American Dream
paintings.description:
This piece is a tribute to everyone chasing their dreams in United States.
Yes, US is The Happiest Place on Earth, but one should always remember that hard work, hard work, and once again hard work must be followed by party hard.
paintings.music: America, F*** Yeah - Team America OST

paintings.name: Courage Attack
paintings.description: If a panic attack can hit you out of nowhere, so can a courage attack.
paintings.music: Door of Cosmos - Armonica Cosmos Mix

paintings.name: Under Influence
paintings.description:
Hey Lenny,
Big fan here! Last week, I listened to your podcast with Graham Weaver, and it was truly inspiring - it had such a profound impact on me that I created a painting dedicated to your podcast.

paintings.name: Mr. Ha
paintings.description: This one is for our friend Brian - hands down the most stylish person in SF. From his home to his car, everything he touches just works. This Mooonarch is our tribute to his iconic vibe and how much we love him.

paintings.name: Cartman
paintings.description: Cartman

paintings.name: Wine
paintings.description: Good times don't ask for permission, and they don't need a reason.
paintings.music: A$AP Rocky - Everyday ft. Rod Stewart, Miguel, Mark Ronson

paintings.name: Serfer
paintings.description: A perfect snapshot of one day in the life of one incredible family.

paintings.name: Breath in, Breath out
paintings.description: The message 'Breathe in, breathe out' is only visible when you look through the red glasses. It’s a literal reminder that the thing capable of changing your life is often right in front of you - you just need to change your perspective to see it.

paintings.name: Astronaut in flowers
paintings.description: An astronaut offering flowers. A simple metaphor for a friend who brings life and color into the coldest, emptiest spaces.

paintings.name: I’m Fine
paintings.description:
Visual anchors from the future to remind of something important.
This one is meant to remind my friend who he truly is.

paintings.name: Mooonopoly Man
paintings.description: Meet Mooonopoly Man. He’s here with a simple, grounded reminder: the most valuable things in this world will always be for free. Everything else is just a game we play.

paintings.name: Warrior
paintings.description: Inspired by photo shoot of out friend.

paintings.name: Angel
paintings.description: It’s no coincidence that a biblically accurate angel and the structure of an atom look identical; this Mooonarch proves that science and faith are just two different languages describing the exact same magic.

about.heading: Mooonarch Mision
about.subheading: Confidence like a 4-year-old in astronaut pajamas.
about.bio: I don’t paint for everyone to like my art. I paint to remind the builders - the ones who change the world with their actions - that the world loves you. The world needs you. Keep on building. Find the one Mooonarch that changes your life, hang it on your wall, and let it be your proof that action beats talk every single time.
